name: Trust Evidence Workbench Scaffold
controlling_principle: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
boundary: Static advisory prototype only. The Trust Evidence Workbench does not retrieve live evidence, persist evidence to a backend, create tickets, send notifications, enforce actions, integrate with external systems, or perform automated verification.
purpose: Provide a broader evidence workbench for manual evidence entry, evidence state transitions, ownership, review accountability, and proof-pack traceability while preserving prototype boundaries.

evidence_states.label: Provided
evidence_states.meaning: Evidence is present but may still require quality review.

evidence_states.label: Stale
evidence_states.meaning: Evidence exists but may be outdated.

evidence_states.label: Assumed
evidence_states.meaning: Reliance depends on an assumption rather than verified evidence.

evidence_states.label: Conflicting
evidence_states.meaning: Available evidence conflicts or does not reconcile.

evidence_states.label: Needs Verification
evidence_states.meaning: Evidence requires qualified human review before reliance.

evidence_states.label: Verified by Human
evidence_states.meaning: A qualified reviewer has verified the evidence for the stated reliance purpose.

sample_evidence_items.evidence_title: Official source definitions and scope notes
sample_evidence_items.source_note: Manual source reference placeholder. No live retrieval performed.
sample_evidence_items.risk_if_wrong: Definitions may be misused in executive or public explanation.
sample_evidence_items.next_action: Verify definitions against authoritative source and update evidence state.

sample_evidence_items.evidence_title: Current Medicaid matching rules and state context
sample_evidence_items.source_note: Manual source reference placeholder. No live retrieval performed.
sample_evidence_items.risk_if_wrong: Policy or financial reliance may be materially wrong.
sample_evidence_items.next_action: Collect current federal and state Medicaid references and review fiscal-year context.

sample_evidence_items.evidence_title: Education funding split by year and jurisdiction
sample_evidence_items.source_note: Manual source reference placeholder. No live retrieval performed.
sample_evidence_items.risk_if_wrong: Education funding responsibilities may be misstated for the wrong jurisdiction or year.
sample_evidence_items.next_action: Verify funding split by year, jurisdiction, and source methodology.

sample_evidence_items.risk_if_wrong: Product doctrine may be overstated as live verification capability.
sample_evidence_items.next_action: Keep limitations attached to any demo or board narrative.

state_transition_rules: missing may move to provided only when a human adds a source note or artifact reference
provided may move to needs_verification when reliance is high-stakes
needs_verification may move to verified_by_human only after reviewer, review note, and scope are documented
assumed may not move directly to verified_by_human without evidence being provided first
conflicting may not move to verified_by_human until conflict resolution is documented
stale may not move to verified_by_human until currency and source date are reviewed
definition_of_done: Workbench appears in Evidence, Runtime, and Proof Pack
Manual evidence entry fields appear editable-looking but local-only
Sample evidence items are traceable to claims, decisions, and Proof Pack sections
No backend persistence, live evidence retrieval, ticketing, notification, or workflow automation claims
